name: 미친 타워가 되었다: 반주년 미친쿠폰 이벤트

detail.description:
Thanks to all the Commanders, Mita is successfully celebrating its Half-Anniversary!

We have prepared gifts to express our gratitude! There is also a new server available!

Take this opportunity to start playing Mita!

Coupon: ILOVEMITA

1. Mythical Hero Random Card*1

2. 1-Star Legendary Equipment Random Box*1

3. Summon Ticket*50

4. Select Epic Unit Fragment*50

5. Voucher*100,000

🔥New Update! [Battle of the Abyss] Open!

1. The new event-type content [Battle of the Abyss] has opened.

2.
